data.title: Robert Half executives Paul F. Gentzkow recognized in Staffing Industry Analysts' 2026 North America Staffing 100 list.
data.description: In Menlo Park, California on January 14, 2026, two executives from Robert Half, a global talent solutions and business consulting firm listed on NYSE as RHI, have been recognized on the Staffing Industry Analysts' 2026 North America Staffing 100 list. Among them is Paul F. Gentzkow, serving as the president and CEO of Talent. This acknowledgment further highlights the impact and expertise of individuals within the staffing industry.

data.title: Shea Shumpert named president of Counselors of Real Estate, only fourth leader in 72-year history.
data.description: In a historic move, Shea Shumpert has become the fourth president in the 72-year existence of the Counselors of Real Estate, a renowned global association of commercial property advisors. The appointment was made in Chicago on January 14, 2026. This marks a significant milestone in the organization's history, reflecting the continuity and stability of leadership with only four individuals having held this prestigious position over the past seven decades.

data.title: Palmetto appoints Jigar Shah to advisory board to boost clean energy growth. Expertise to accelerate US energy transition.
data.description: Palmetto, the top consumer energy platform in America, recently revealed the addition of a highly experienced individual to their team. The new member, a previous Director of the DOE Loan Programs Office and Co-Founder of Generate Capital, brings unmatched infrastructure finance knowledge to contribute towards advancing the clean energy transition in the country. The announcement was made on January 14, 2026, in Charlotte, N.C.

data.title: RiseLink showcases edge intelligence solutions for AI devices at CES 2026, gathering leaders from AI, hardware, connected products.
data.description: At the CES 2026 in Las Vegas on January 14, 2026, RiseLink Technologies, a company specializing in edge intelligence and ultra-low-power connectivity solutions for AI-native devices, convened top industry figures in the fields of AI, hardware, and connected products to discuss the advancement of intelligence beyond traditional boundaries.

Trade is top of the agenda for Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney - who's in China for his first official visit. The trip comes as Ottawa faces uncertainty over its trade relationship with the U.S., its largest export market. Relations between China and Canada have improved

data.title: Port Houston opens new administration building in Historic Fifth Ward, 93,000 sq ft, celebrating spirit of industry and community.
data.description: Port Houston is opening a new administration building in Houston’s Historic Fifth Ward to honor the region's industrial history. The 93,000 square feet modern facility in the East River development showcases the importance of collaboration and community. This relocation underscores Port Houston's dedication to staying connected to the waterway it operates along Buffalo Bayou.

data.title: Journal of Clinical Pharmacology (JCP), flagship of ACCP, celebrates 65 years of leadership in advancing clinical pharmacology.
data.description: In Ashburn, Virginia, as of January 14, 2026, the Journal of Clinical Pharmacology (JCP), which serves as the primary journal of the American College of Clinical Pharmacology® (ACCP), is commemorating its 65th anniversary. This significant milestone symbolizes over 60 years of guiding the progression of the field through research and practical application.

data.title: Desert Mountain Energy announces private placement offering without brokers' assistance. TSX.V: DME US OTC: DMEHF Frankfurt: QM01.
data.description: Desert Mountain Energy Corp. (TSXV: DME, U.S. OTC: DMEHF, Frankfurt: QM01) based in Vancouver, BC made a recent announcement on Jan. 14, 2026, through the company president. DME is moving forward with a non-brokered private placement.

data.title: Covalent Metrology rebrands as Covalent, offering expanded services with a new website launched on Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Sunnyvale, California, Covalent Metrology, has recently rebranded as Covalent, as of January 14, 2026. Alongside the rebranding, they unveiled a new website that showcases an expanded range of products and services. The updated branding is a nod to Covalent's transition into a more comprehensive and advanced entity, offering a revamped set of offerings to its customers. This shift signifies a strategic move towards encompassing a wider scope in their business approach.

data.title: Winnebago debuts RV innovations at Florida RV SuperShow, unveiling new models and features across brands, running Jan 14-18.
data.description: EDEN PRAIRIE, Minnesota - Winnebago Industries, Inc. (NYSE: WGO), a top outdoor lifestyle product manufacturer, is showcasing new models and innovative features at the Florida RV SuperShow. The event, located at the Florida State Fairgrounds in Tampa, will run from January 14 to 18, 2026. Winnebago, Grand Design RV, and Newmar, the company's premium brands, are introducing a range of products including motorized coaches, travel trailers, toy haulers, and fifth wheels. This diverse lineup aims to enhance outdoor experiences and provide consumers with versatile ways to enjoy adventures in the great outdoors.

data.title: Sei introduces market grid with $100B+ transaction partners, including Alchemy, Privy, and Thirdweb integrations.
data.description: The Sei Network has officially rolled out a new developer tooling system that includes integrations with Alchemy, Privy, and Thirdweb. This comprehensive system aims to drive enterprise blockchain adoption by providing developers with the necessary tools to build and deploy blockchain solutions. The integration of these tools offers a wide range of functionalities and capabilities to streamline the development process. This move signifies Sei Network's commitment to fostering innovation and growth in the blockchain industry. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting development.

data.title: SPYRT Worldwide launches 3-liter Ukrainian vodka Howitzer Edition made from refurbished tubes. Available online in 13 states.
data.description: A special edition of products has been launched by SPYRT Worldwide, a veteran-founded importer focusing on bringing Ukraine's top wines and spirits to the U.S. The release is currently accessible for online purchase in 13 states along with Washington, D.C. as of January 14, 2026.

data.title: Stocks drop as technology and financial sectors weaken, Nasdaq down 1.5%, S&P 500 falls nearly 1%, Dow Jones lower by 0.5%. Supreme Court to decide on Trump's tariffs with only 35% chance in his favor.
data.description: Wall Street experienced a decline on Wednesday due to weakness in technology and financial stocks, causing major indexes to decrease. Investors are being cautious as they await a Supreme Court ruling on the legality of President Donald Trump's tariffs. Polymarket predicts there is a mere 35% chance the judges will rule in favor of Trump's tariffs. The Nasdaq 100 plummeted over 1.5% during midday trading in New York, marking its worst session in almost a month. Semiconductors were the primary driver of the selloff, with Broadcom Inc. down around 5%, Oracle Corp. falling by 4.5%, and Nvidia Corp. decreasing by 2.5%. The S&P 500 also saw a decline of nearly 1%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreased by 0.5%. For more information, the full report is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tech company introduces blockchain platform for direct stock lending - Nasdaq-listed firm to offer onchain equity system for issuing and lending real shares on blockchain.
data.description: A company listed on the Nasdaq is introducing a new onchain equity system. This system enables the direct issuance and lending of actual shares on blockchain technology.

data.title: Miles Ahead Brands launches Milestone Supply as a solution to simplify aggregate distribution.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on January 14, 2026, Miles Ahead Brands has unveiled Milestone Supply, a comprehensive solution to streamline the procurement, sale, and transportation of aggregate materials. Leveraging their extensive experience, this new offering aims to simplify processes for businesses involved in managing aggregate materials.

data.title: Pillar To Post recognized in Entrepreneur Magazine's 2026 Franchise 500® Ranking. North America's largest home inspection company.
data.description: Pillar To Post Home Inspectors, the leading franchise in the home inspection industry, has received further validation for its system strength, longevity, and franchise support. The company, based in Tampa, Florida, was acknowledged on January 14, 2026. Pillar To Post is North America's largest home inspection company.
